title: E-commerce Platform
description: A full-featured e-commerce store with cart and checkout.
longDescription: This project is a comprehensive e-commerce solution featuring a responsive product grid, integrated shopping cart, secure user authentication, and a streamlined checkout process. Built with the MERN stack.

title: Health & Fitness Tracker
description: A sleek dashboard to track workouts and nutrition.
longDescription: A dynamic frontend application for tracking fitness goals, visualizing progress with interactive charts, and managing daily nutrition. Built with React and optimized for performance.

title: Social Media Dashboard
description: A minimalist dashboard for social media management.
longDescription: A clean and efficient social media management dashboard. It allows users to view analytics, schedule posts, and manage multiple accounts from a single, intuitive interface.
